title: Nursery Rhyme. CXCII. Riddles.
content:
[A walnut.]

        As soft as silk, as white as milk,
        As bitter as gall, a thick wall,
        And a green coat covers me all.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CXCII. Riddles." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
